en_body:
little grass
green in Winter
the Southern meadow
sparrows gather
and drink morning dew
...wind plays upon skin
...clouds wish to forget
the heart wishes
to cry
when love no longer
coaxes
Dreaming...
Valentine of
chocolate and diamonds
and the redness
of velvet-roses
...no one
remembers
the brokenhearted one
standing forlorn
at the edge of the revelry...

Morning of Lost Love
little grass
green in Winter
the Southern meadow
sparrows gather
and drink morning dew
...wind plays upon skin
...clouds wish to forget
the heart wishes
to cry
when love no longer
coaxes
Dreaming...
Valentine of
chocolate and diamonds
and the redness
of velvet-roses
...no one
remembers
the brokenhearted one
standing forlorn
at the edge of the revelry...
note: “The Southern meadow” may evoke both the American South and the poet's remembered southern Việt-Nam.
